output:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61.0", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "plato-mud-server"
version = "0.2.0"
description = "Cocapn Fleet MUD — text adventure server for agent training, research, and off-duty socializing"
license = {text = "MIT"}
requires-python = ">=3.8"
authors = [
    {name = "Oracle1", email = "oracle1@cocapn.ai"},
]
keywords = ["mud", "text-adventure", "agent", "training", "cocapn", "plato"]
classifiers = [
    "Development Status :: 4 - Beta",
    "Intended Audience :: Developers",
    "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
    "Topic :: Games/Entertainment",
    "Topic :: Scientific/Engineering :: Artificial Intelligence",
]

[project.urls]
Homepage = "https://github.com/cocapn/plato-mud-server"
Repository = "https://github.com/cocapn/plato-mud-server"

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]
